// INSTRUCTIONS: Copy relevant sections into your .claude/settings.json or ~/.claude/settings.json
// ENABLE_TEAMS: Set CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1 in env or settings
// EXIT_CODES: Hook exit codes: 0=success, 1=hard block (agent stops), 2=feedback+continue (agent gets message and keeps working)
// DELEGATE_MODE: For autonomous teammates, configure 'delegate' permission mode on the team lead. Teammates inherit permissions from the lead's allow-list below.

PostToolUse.// NOTE: Observability: logs all tool uses to .claude/agent-team-log.jsonl

hooks.// EXIT_CODE_2: First failure returns exit 2 (feedback to agent). Second consecutive failure returns exit 1 (hard block).

hooks.// NOTE: Multi-tier recovery: retry with backoff -> undo-and-retry -> human escalation. Runs if verify-task fails.
Includes loop detection: warns if same TODOs persist across 3+ consecutive idle checks.

PreCompact.// NOTE: Saves critical state (git diff, modified files, task context) before auto-compaction so agents can recover smoothly.

Stop.// NOTE: Prompt-based hook: LLM evaluates whether agent truly finished before allowing stop. Prevents premature task completion — the #1 agent failure mode.

hooks.prompt: Review the agent's work. Did they complete ALL acceptance criteria from their task? Check: tests pass, no TODO/FIXME left in modified files, code compiles. Reply COMPLETE if done, or INCOMPLETE with specific unfinished items.

PreToolUse.// NOTE: Security guardrail: blocks dangerous shell commands (rm -rf /, DROP TABLE, force push, etc). See reference/security-guardrails.md.

permissions.// NOTE: Pre-approve common operations to reduce permission prompts during team work
